plugin.name: Solao_Info_Window
plugin.author: Solao
plugin.purpose: Capture INFO: lines into a scrollable dockable miniwindow, gagged from output
plugin.description: Captures every 'INFO: ...' line into its own draggable, resizable, scrollable miniwindow (keeping the original colors) and gags it from the main output. Drag the title bar to move; drag the bottom-right grip to resize; mouse-wheel to scroll back. Type 'infowin' to show/hide.

muclient.script:
require "movewindow" require "serialize"
local win = GetPluginID() local TITLE = "INFO" local PVER = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) or "?"
local cfg local lines = {} -- buffer: each entry = list of {text, colour} local scroll = 0 -- lines scrolled up from the bottom local drag_x0, drag_y0, drag_w0, drag_h0
local COL = { bg=ColourNameToRGB("#0d1117"), bar=ColourNameToRGB("#161b2e"), dim=ColourNameToRGB("#8a93a8"), accent=ColourNameToRGB("#e94560"), border=ColourNameToRGB("#3a4a6b"), deftext=ColourNameToRGB("#c8d0dc"), } local PAD = 5
local function defaults () return { x=nil, y=nil, w=420, h=200, font="Lucida Console", size=9, buffer=100 } end
-- how many INFO lines to keep for scrollback ('infowin buffer <n>') local function maxbuf () return cfg.buffer or 100 end
-- drop the oldest lines when the buffer shrinks or overflows local function trim_buffer () while #lines > maxbuf() do table.remove(lines, 1) end end
local function fh () return WindowFontInfo(win, "f", 1) or 12 end local function title_h () return fh() + PAD end local function lineh () return fh() + 1 end local function visible () return math.max(1, math.floor((cfg.h - title_h() - PAD*2) / lineh())) end local function maxscroll () return math.max(0, #lines - visible()) end
local function repaint () WindowShow(win, true) pcall(CallPlugin, "abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") end
local function paint () WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, COL.bg) WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, cfg.w, title_h(), COL.bar) WindowText(win, "fb", TITLE, PAD, PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.accent) if scroll > 0 then WindowText(win, "f", " (scrolled +"..scroll..")", PAD + WindowTextWidth(win,"fb",TITLE), PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.dim) end
local vis = visible() local last = #lines - scroll local first = math.max(1, last - vis + 1) local y = title_h() + PAD for i = first, last do local x = PAD for _, r in ipairs(lines[i]) do WindowText(win, "f", r.text, x, y, 0, 0, r.colour or COL.deftext) x = x + WindowTextWidth(win, "f", r.text) end y = y + lineh() end
-- resize grip (bottom-right) for i = 1, 3 do local o = i*3 WindowLine(win, cfg.w-o-2, cfg.h-2, cfg.w-2, cfg.h-o-2, COL.dim, 0, 1) end WindowRectOp(win, 1, 0, 0, cfg.w-1, cfg.h-1, COL.border) repaint() end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- capture (trigger) : keep the original colors via the styles arg ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function capture (name, line, wildcards, styles) local runs = {} for _, s in ipairs(styles or {}) do runs[#runs+1] = { text = s.text, colour = s.textcolour } end if #runs == 0 then runs = {{ text = line, colour = COL.deftext }} end lines[#lines+1] = runs trim_buffer() if scroll > 0 then scroll = math.min(maxscroll(), scroll + 1) end -- hold view if scrolled up EnableTriggerGroup("end_gag", true) -- gag the trailing blank Aardwolf pads INFO with paint() end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- window plumbing ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function add_hotspots () WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win) WindowAddHotspot(win, "body", 0, title_h(), cfg.w, cfg.h, "","","","","", "", miniwin.cursor_arrow, 0) WindowScrollwheelHandler(win, "body", "on_wheel") local g = math.max(12, fh()) WindowAddHotspot(win, "grip", cfg.w-g, cfg.h-g, cfg.w, cfg.h, "","","grip_down","","", "drag to resize", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "grip", "grip_move", "grip_up", 0) movewindow.add_drag_handler(win, 0, 0, cfg.w, title_h()) end
local function relayout () WindowResize(win, cfg.w, cfg.h, COL.bg) add_hotspots() paint() end
function on_wheel (flags, id) local up = bit.band(flags, 0x100) == 0 if up then scroll = math.min(maxscroll(), scroll + 3) else scroll = math.max(0, scroll - 3) end paint() end
function grip_down (flags, id) drag_x0, drag_y0, drag_w0, drag_h0 = WindowInfo(win,17), WindowInfo(win,18), cfg.w, cfg.h end function grip_move (flags, id) cfg.w = math.max(180, drag_w0 + (WindowInfo(win,17) - (drag_x0 or 0))) cfg.h = math.max(80, drag_h0 + (WindowInfo(win,18) - (drag_y0 or 0))) WindowResize(win, cfg.w, cfg.h, COL.bg) -- resize + repaint only; DON'T rebuild paint() -- (would delete the live grip hotspot) SetCursor(miniwin.cursor_hand) end function grip_up (flags, id) add_hotspots(); SaveState() end -- now safe to re-place hotspots
function titlebar (flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then local r = WindowMenu(win, WindowInfo(win,14), WindowInfo(win,15), "Bring to Front|Send to Back|-|Hide|Clear") if r == "Bring to Front" then CallPlugin("462b665ecb569efbf261422f", "boostMe", win) elseif r == "Send to Back" then CallPlugin("462b665ecb569efbf261422f", "dropMe", win) elseif r == "Hide" then WindowShow(win, false) elseif r == "Clear" then lines = {}; scroll = 0; paint() end end end
function toggle () if WindowInfo(win, 5) then WindowShow(win, false) else WindowShow(win, true); paint() end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- commands ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function iw_cmd (arg) arg = (arg or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") local verb, rest = arg:match("^(%S+)%s*(.*)$") verb = (verb or ""):lower()
if verb == "" then toggle()
elseif verb == "buffer" then local n = tonumber(rest) if not n then ColourNote("cyan","", TITLE.." buffer: "..maxbuf().." lines ("..#lines.." held)") elseif n < 10 or n > 5000 then ColourNote("orange","", "Buffer must be 10-5000 lines.") else cfg.buffer = math.floor(n) trim_buffer() if scroll > maxscroll() then scroll = maxscroll() end paint(); SaveState() ColourNote("green","", TITLE.." buffer: "..maxbuf().." lines.") end
elseif verb == "clear" then lines = {}; scroll = 0; paint() ColourNote("green","", TITLE.." cleared.")
elseif verb == "show" then WindowShow(win, true); paint() elseif verb == "hide" then WindowShow(win, false)
else ColourNote("cyan","", TITLE.." Window v"..PVER) for _, l in ipairs({ " infowin - show/hide the window", " infowin buffer <n> - scrollback lines to keep (10-5000, default 100)", " infowin buffer - show the current setting", " infowin clear - empty the buffer", " infowin show | hide - force it open/closed", "Drag the title bar to move, the bottom-right grip to resize, mouse-wheel", "to scroll. Right-click the title bar for Front / Back / Hide / Clear.", }) do ColourNote("white","", l) end end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginInstall () cfg = defaults() local blob = GetVariable("cfg") if blob then local ok = pcall(function() assert(loadstring(blob))() end) if ok and saved then for k, v in pairs(saved) do cfg[k] = v end end end windowinfo = movewindow.install(win, miniwin.pos_top_left, miniwin.create_absolute_location, false, nil, { mouseup = titlebar }, { x = cfg.x or 10, y = cfg.y or 40 }) WindowCreate(win, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, cfg.w, cfg.h, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, COL.bg) WindowFont(win, "f", cfg.font, cfg.size, false, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "fb", cfg.font, cfg.size, true, false, false, false, 0) relayout() WindowShow(win, true) end
function SaveState () SetVariable("cfg", "saved = "..serialize.save_simple(cfg)) if WindowInfo(win, 1) then movewindow.save_state(win) end end function OnPluginSaveState () SaveState() end
function OnPluginClose () WindowShow(win, false); WindowDelete(win) end
